# CannaScope CT Beta Version 4
# Core:
requests==2.34.2
reportlab==4.5.1
pypdfium2==5.8.0
Pillow==12.2.0

# OCR — lets the tool read scanned/image-only COAs (recommended).
#   macOS uses Apple Vision via ocrmac (no extra system install needed).
#   Other systems use tesseract (also `apt install tesseract-ocr` etc.).
ocrmac==1.0.1 ; sys_platform == 'darwin'
pytesseract==0.3.13 ; sys_platform != 'darwin'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Version 4 also ships ct_cannabis_names.py (producer/lab name resolution) and an
# optional dba_overrides.csv — keep them in the same folder as the script.
# Older versions remain available as tagged releases:
#   V3 .......... requests reportlab pypdfium2 (+ ocrmac/pytesseract)
#   V2 .......... requests reportlab pypdfium2
#   Beta V1 ..... requests pdfplumber reportlab
